category_sources: source_facts.description says it saves and runs project-specific commands.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is just; source_facts.repo project is casey/just.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, whose README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/casey/just, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies command running/task automation; current_curation.tags includes cli.
